metadata.description: Make Claude watch any video. Local file, public URL, or Jira attachment. Frames + Whisper transcription + paste-ready evidence-bundle Markdown.

plugins.name: watch-video
plugins.description: Watch a video (local path, public URL, or Jira issue key). Downloads with yt-dlp or Atlassian REST, extracts keyframes with ffmpeg, transcribes with local faster-whisper or hosted Groq/OpenAI Whisper, produces a paste-ready report.md.
